title: Better Damage to Golems
description:
This is my first mod!

This mod is a way to get more accurate damage to golems into Minecraft via increasing the damage dealt to golems using a pickaxe whilst taking efficiency into account.

This mod was inspired by the game Muck By Dani.
body:
This is my first mod!

This mod was created to change the player's approach to fighting Golems by increasing the damage dealt with a pickaxe, while taking Efficiency into account by acting like Sharpness.
